title: iberidella rotundifolia
intro: Iberidella rotundifolia, also known as the round-leafed broomrape, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of iridoid glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and respiratory issues. Iberidella rotundifolia can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
